questions.text: Does your organization have a documented AI strategy aligned to business objectives?
Are AI initiatives sponsored at C-suite or board level?
Do you have a defined AI governance framework and oversight committee?
Is there a clear budget allocated for AI initiatives over the next 12-24 months?
Does your AI strategy include a competitive landscape analysis?
Are AI KPIs and success metrics defined and tracked?
Does your organization conduct regular AI maturity reviews?
Is there a documented process for AI prioritization and portfolio management?
Does the strategy include AI talent acquisition and retention planning?
Are AI vendor/partner selection criteria formally defined?
Is there an AI innovation pipeline or incubation process?
Does your organization participate in AI industry forums or standards bodies?
Do you have a scalable cloud or hybrid infrastructure capable of supporting ML workloads?
Are MLOps or AI engineering pipelines established for model lifecycle management?
Is there a feature store or reusable ML feature repository in place?
Do you use CI/CD practices for AI/ML model deployment?
Are model monitoring and drift detection systems operational?
Is there a model registry with versioning and audit trails?
Do you have GPU/specialized compute provisioned or on-demand access?
Are AI development environments standardized and reproducible?
Is there API gateway / integration layer for AI services?
Do you employ A/B testing or shadow deployment for AI models?
Is there observability tooling (logging, tracing) for AI services in production?
Does your tech stack support real-time inference at scale?
Is a comprehensive data governance framework implemented and enforced?
Do you have a unified data catalog with lineage and quality metrics?
Is your data accessible in a centralized lake or lakehouse architecture?
Are data quality standards defined and monitored with automated pipelines?
Is training data labeled, versioned, and stored in a reproducible manner?
Do you have processes to handle data drift and distribution shift over time?
Is there a data privacy and consent management framework aligned to regulation?
Are synthetic data generation capabilities available where real data is limited?
Is data enrichment and third-party data integration supported?
Are master data management practices in place?
Is real-time data streaming infrastructure available for time-sensitive AI use cases?
Is data access governed by role-based controls and audited?
Is there a dedicated AI/ML team with clear roles (Data Scientists, ML Engineers, etc.)?
Does your organization have an AI Center of Excellence (CoE) or equivalent?
Are AI literacy training programs available to non-technical staff?
Is there a formal change management process for AI adoption?
Are cross-functional AI project teams (business + tech) standard practice?
Is there an established process for business stakeholders to submit AI use case ideas?
Does leadership visibly champion AI adoption and transformation?
Is there a formal AI ethics policy understood by all employees?
Does your performance management system include AI skills and contributions?
Are AI project methodologies (agile, lean AI) defined and used?
Is there a process for capturing and sharing AI learnings across the organization?
Are external AI partnerships (academia, vendors, startups) actively managed?
Is AI model security (adversarial robustness, prompt injection protection) addressed?
Are AI systems included in your threat modeling and security review processes?
Is there a policy for handling PII and sensitive data in AI model training and inference?
Are AI models and data pipelines subject to penetration testing?
Is model explainability required for high-risk AI decisions?
Are access controls and least-privilege enforced for AI training environments?
Do you have an AI incident response plan?
Is there supply chain security assessment for third-party ML models or datasets?
Are AI systems audited for bias, fairness, and discriminatory outcomes?
Is there encryption at rest and in transit for all AI training data?
Is there a process for responsible disclosure of AI model failures?
Are AI-related regulatory compliance requirements (GDPR, AI Act, etc.) tracked?
Are AI use cases prioritized using a value vs. feasibility framework?
Do you have at least one AI use case in production delivering measurable business value?
Is there a use case backlog managed with ROI estimates and risk profiles?
Are lessons from AI pilots systematically captured and applied?
Are AI use cases reviewed for ethical implications before development?
Is there a mechanism to sunset or retrain AI models that underperform?
Are business stakeholders actively involved in defining AI success criteria?
Do you track post-deployment performance against baseline business metrics?
Are use case templates or playbooks available to accelerate new initiatives?
Is there a process for users to provide feedback on AI-powered features?
Does use case development follow a structured experimentation framework?
Are AI use cases documented and accessible to enable knowledge transfer?
